examples: One way to lower costs will be to forge alliances with foreign companies or to expand internationally through appropriate takeovers – in short, to "globalize."
It is difficult for service organizations to globalize.
Globalize products by reusing components and examples.
Way back when, we at HDS wanted to globalize and we did that very successfully.
Globalize the total value chain (product planning, product development, approval, procurement, production, and sales).
